holdings.infoBox: CFA is an equity ETF with a total of 502 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 0.40%, WEC Energy Group at 0.39%, Alliant Energy at 0.39%, Duke Energy at 0.39%, and Loews at 0.39%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares US 500 Volatility Wtd ETF (CFA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of the largest US stocks by market cap, screened for positive earnings and weighted by volatility. CFA was launched on Jul 2, 2014 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory U.S. Large Cap 500 Volatility Weighted Index
